channel.title: Public-Preview on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Public-Preview on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Managed Service for Prometheus now includes native Grafana dashboards within the Azure portal
item.description:
Azure announces a public preview where Azure Managed Service for Prometheus now includes native Grafana dashboards accessible within the Azure portal at no additional cost, aiming to simplify observability and reduce administrative overhead.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Assign Azure Boards work items to Copilot coding agent in public preview
item.description:
GitHub announced a public preview that lets you assign Azure Boards work items to the Copilot coding agent. The agent works asynchronously and autonomously in the background to implement tasks and open draft pull requests for your review.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager – update run approval gates
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager (public preview) now lets you add approval gates to update runs. Gates can be placed before and after update groups and stages to give operators manual control over the progression of an update run.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Functions .NET 10 support
item.description:
Azure Functions now supports .NET 10 in Public Preview. To use it, change the Functions project’s target framework and update Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.Sdk to version 2.0.5 or later. The announcement also indicates .NET 10 projects can be deployed to app (source content truncated).

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Databricks One in Azure Databricks
item.description:
Databricks One is available in Azure Databricks as a public preview offering a unified, simplified platform that combines data engineering, analytics, and AI development into a single, governed environment with integrated collaboration and enterprise governance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure HBv5-series VMs
item.description:
Azure HBv5-series VMs are now available in Public Preview in the Azure South Central US region and are optimized for memory-bandwidth-intensive HPC workloads such as computational fluid dynamics, automotive and aerospace simulations, and weather modeling.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.1 is now available in public preview in Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Xcode, and Eclipse
item.description:
Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.1 has entered public preview for GitHub Copilot users and is being rolled out in Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Xcode, and Eclipse, as announced on the GitHub Blog.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise license history tracking now available in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise admins can now view a history of license usage with daily snapshots of additions and removals for GitHub Enterprise Cloud; the feature is available in public preview.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Auto model selection for Copilot in VS Code in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code has a new Auto model selection option in public preview that automatically picks the model for you via the model picker.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) support for JetBrains IDEs and Xcode in public preview
item.description:
GitHub announced that Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) support is now in public preview for GitHub Copilot Chat within JetBrains IDEs and Xcode. Users with a supported API key can use their own key to access Copilot Chat in these IDEs.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Pull request “Files changed” public preview experience – September 11 updates
item.description:
GitHub updated the public preview of the pull request “Files changed” page on September 11, 2025, improving performance and raising the file limit. The release also adds a single-file view and other refinements for a smoother review experience.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Actions: macOS 26 image now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Actions now offers a macOS 26 runner image in public preview so developers can natively use the latest Xcode technology to build and test iOS apps in their workflow runs.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure MySQL Self Heal
item.description:
Azure Database for MySQL – Flexible Server now offers a Self-Heal feature in Public Preview that provides self-healing tools to proactively resolve common server issues (for example, unresponsive servers) without needing to open a support case.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: File share centric management model (Microsoft.FileShares) for Azure Files
item.description:
Azure Files is in public preview for a file share–centric management model (Microsoft.FileShares) that makes file shares top-level resources to simplify creating and managing file shares in Azure.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Dependabot alerts now support production context prioritization in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Dependabot alerts can now use production context from external artifact registries (for example, JFrog Artifactory) and CI/CD workflows to filter and prioritize alerts. The capability is available as a public preview, letting teams focus remediation on vulnerabilities that affect production artifacts and deployments.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Graph Query Language (GQL) in KQL graph semantics
item.description:
Microsoft announced public preview support for the ISO-aligned Graph Query Language (GQL) within KQL graph semantics, enabling GQL queries to run on Fabric Eventhouse and Azure Data Explorer to simplify working with graph data using an industry standard.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Functions support for Python 3.13
item.description:
Azure Functions now supports Python 3.13 in public preview, and introduces an opt-in runtime version control feature that lets you target specific Functions Python runtime versions when developing locally and deploying to Azure.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: .NET 10 Preview Now Available on Azure App Service
item.description:
Microsoft announced the Public Preview of .NET 10 on Azure App Service for both Windows and Linux, enabling developers to run modern web workloads such as ASP.NET apps, Blazor, and Minimal APIs on the platform.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Manage Copilot and users via Enterprise Teams in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Cloud launched Enterprise Teams in public preview to simplify enterprise user management and Copilot license administration; enterprise owners can now add users directly to the enterprise and manage Copilot access at the enterprise level.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Confluent Kafka Connector in Azure Logic Apps (Standard)
item.description:
Microsoft announced the public preview of the Confluent Kafka Connector for Azure Logic Apps (Standard), enabling Logic Apps to both send and receive messages with Confluent Kafka, a distributed streaming platform.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Expanded support for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) in Azure API Management
item.description:
Azure API Management is in public preview with expanded support for the Model Context Protocol (MCP), adding MCP support in v2 SKUs and the ability to expose existing MCP-compliant servers to simplify connecting APIs and AI agents.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Organizational Templates in Azure Logic Apps
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps now has a public preview of Organizational Templates, enabling teams to create, share, and reuse automation patterns inside their organization to standardize integrations at scale.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot’s next edit suggestion (NES) in public preview in JetBrains
item.description:
GitHub Copilot’s Next Edit Suggestions (NES) feature is now in public preview for JetBrains IDEs, enabling proactive code editing and improvement suggestions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Improvements to the home dashboard available in public preview
item.description:
GitHub has introduced a public preview of enhancements to the home dashboard, focusing on content and layout improvements to help users track their key work status and navigation.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: OpenAI GPT-5 mini is now available in public preview in Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Xcode, and Eclipse
item.description:
OpenAI’s GPT-5 mini is now publicly available in preview for GitHub Copilot users within Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Xcode, and Eclipse.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Entra ID group login using user credentials
item.description:
Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server now supports Entra ID group login using user credentials in public preview on new servers. This feature aims to simplify user management and enhance security.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Create sub-issues with Copilot in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now supports creating sub-issues and managing issue relationships via chat on github.com/copilot, available in public preview.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Custom block response code and body for Application Gateway WAF
item.description:
Azure Application Gateway WAF now publicly previews the ability to customize response status codes and bodies for blocked requests.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure NetApp Files short-term clones
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files introduces short-term clones in public preview, allowing instant, space-efficient read/write access by creating temporary thin clones from volume snapshots without full data copies.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Roslyn Analyzer for Durable Functions in .NET isolated
item.description:
The Roslyn Analyzer for Durable Functions in the .NET isolated model is now available in public preview, providing real-time code analysis to enforce durable orchestration coding constraints.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB (vCore) encryption with customer-managed key
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB (vCore) now supports encryption with customer-managed keys in public preview, adding to the existing service-managed key encryption.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Managed Instance for Apache Cassandra v5.0
item.description:
Azure Managed Instance for Apache Cassandra now supports Cassandra 5.0 in public preview, enabling access to the latest features such as improved performance and new indexing capabilities without infrastructure management.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Introducing Azure App Testing: Scalable End-to-end App Validation
item.description:
Azure App Testing is now in public preview, allowing developers and QA teams to perform large-scale functional and performance tests across frameworks such as Playwright, JMeter, and Locust.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Storage Discovery
item.description:
Azure Storage Discovery is now in public preview, offering enterprise-wide visibility into Azure Storage data. It enables deep analysis of capacity and activity to optimize costs, enhance security, and improve operations.

  • Source: Azure Updates
